Consequence for the audit: --runs 3 provided no information about residual noise; the "noise floor a delta must beat" is 0 under freeze, so any A/B delta under --freeze is attributable to the change, but the prior-session claim that judge noise exists was not reproduced here. (4) carded_rate = 0.000 on all videos — the context-card/grounding path never fires on this set, so grounding_precision is unmeasurable (NaN).
